<script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  
    function gtag() {
        dataLayer.push(arguments);
    }

    gtag('set', 'developer_id.dNzMyY2', true);

    /* We are blocking all cookies upon consent for Europe */
    gtag('consent', 'default', {
        'ad_user_data':'denied',
        'ad_personalization': 'denied',
        'ad_storage': 'denied',
        'analytics_storage': 'denied',
        'wait_for_update' : 500,
        'region': [
            'AT', // Austria
            'BE', // Belgium
            'BG', // Bulgaria
            'CH', // Switzerland
            'CY', // Cyprus
            'CZ', // Czech Republic
            'DE', // Germany
            'DK', // Denmark
            'EE', // Estonia
            'ES', // Spain
            'FI', // Finland
            'FR', // France
            'GB', // United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
            'GR', // Greece
            'HR', // Croatia
            'HU', // Hungary
            'IE', // Ireland
            'IS', // Iceland
            'IT', // Italy
            'LT', // Lithuania
            'LV', // Latvia
            'MK', // The former Yugoslav Republic of Macedonia
            'MT', // Malta
            'NL', // Netherlands
            'NO', // Norway
            'PL', // Poland
            'PT', // Portugal
            'RO', // Romania
            'RS', // Serbia
            'SE', // Sweden
            'SI',  // Slovenia
            'RU', // Russia
            'CN', // China
            'BY' // Belarus
        ]
    });

    /* For other regions storages are granted by default */
    gtag('consent', 'default', {
        'ad_user_data':'granted',
        'ad_personalization': 'granted',
        'ad_storage': 'granted',
        'analytics_storage': 'granted',
        'wait_for_update' : 500
    });

    gtag('set', 'ads_data_redaction', true);
  </script>

<!-- Async loading of cookie banner styoles for JS users -->
<script>
(function () {
    var onetrustCssFile = 'one-trust-cookie-banner.css';
    var expStylesBasePath = 'https://mirostatic.com/website/static/production-eu/assets/styles';
    var oldStylesBasePath = 'https://static-website.miro.com/miro-site-lp-build-assets/assets/styles';
    var stylesBasePath = oldStylesBasePath;
    try {
        var getCookie = function (key) {
            if (typeof window === 'undefined') {
                return '';
            }
            return document.cookie.split('; ').reduce(function (total, currentCookie) {
                var parts = currentCookie.split('=');
                var storedKey = parts[0];
                var storedValue = parts[1];
                return key === storedKey ? decodeURIComponent(storedValue) : total;
            }, '');
        };
        // Check __ff_cookie_styles cookie for cookie banner experiment
        var variant = getCookie('__ff_cookie_styles');
        var validVariants = ['on-a', 'on-b', 'on-c'];
        if (validVariants.indexOf(variant) !== -1) {
            onetrustCssFile = 'one-trust-cookie-experiment/one-trust-cta-' + variant + '.css';
            stylesBasePath = expStylesBasePath;
        }
    } catch (error) {
        // Fallback to original file on any error
        onetrustCssFile = 'one-trust-cookie-banner.css';
        stylesBasePath = oldStylesBasePath;
    }
    var link = document.createElement('link');
    link.rel = 'stylesheet';
    link.href = stylesBasePath + '/' + onetrustCssFile;
    link.type = 'text/css';
    link.media = 'screen';
    document.head.appendChild(link);
})()
</script>

<!-- SnippetEnd: legacy-bodyEnd -->
